model: opus46-requested (fallback manual due sub-agent tool-call stall)

urgent.action: Replace all 'February 25, 2026' mentions with 'Early March 2026' across metadata and localized content.
urgent.reasoning: Date mismatch can reduce trust and hurt click-through when users see conflicting launch information.

urgent.action: Add/optimize Chinese title + meta description on /zh/about-kona-coffee with stronger intent match and CTA.
urgent.reasoning: 885 impressions at avg position 6.7 with 0 CTR indicates snippet mismatch, not discoverability.

urgent.action: Fix GA4 tracking pipeline (users/sessions/pageviews currently zero) and validate gtag firing on all locale pages.
urgent.reasoning: Without GA4 behavioral data, optimization decisions are blind and conversion diagnostics are blocked.

quickWins.action: Rewrite homepage title/meta to target 'Kona Coffee Waikiki' + opening update + location intent.
quickWins.reasoning: Position 4.8 with 31 impressions and 0 clicks is a classic low-CTR quick win.

quickWins.action: Create or optimize a local landing section with 'near me' language, hours, map, and schema-enhanced address details.
quickWins.reasoning: Page already ranks around 8.9 with 21 impressions; stronger local relevance can lift CTR and rank.

quickWins.action: Improve /ko/about-kona-coffee title/meta and first paragraph with Korean commercial/local intent terms.
quickWins.reasoning: Position 4.4 with 14 impressions and 0 clicks suggests metadata-language mismatch.

opportunities.action: Build supporting zh/ko/en content cluster around Kona flavor, brewing, and Waikiki shop experience with internal linking to menu/location pages.
opportunities.reasoning: Multilingual informational demand is present, especially Chinese queries, but clicks are not captured yet.

opportunities.action: Expand LocalBusiness/Restaurant schema with openingDate text update, geo, openingHours, menu URL, and sameAs profiles.
opportunities.reasoning: Improved structured data increases rich result eligibility and local confidence signals.

opportunities.action: Acquire local citations/backlinks from Waikiki travel/food directories and Korean community media in HI/US.
opportunities.reasoning: Non-branded growth depends on stronger local authority for competitive 'near me' terms.

insights.observation: Average position is strong (7.0) but CTR is only 1.2%, with many page-1 queries at 0 clicks.
insights.suggestion: Prioritize SERP snippet optimization before publishing large new content batches.

insights.observation: Chinese queries drive the largest impression volume with near-zero engagement.
insights.suggestion: Tune Chinese metadata and intent alignment immediately, then add localized FAQ sections.

insights.observation: GA4 metrics are zero despite active impressions/clicks in GSC.
insights.suggestion: Treat analytics instrumentation as a blocker for reliable optimization scoring.
